UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF BRANDY TRUEMAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING DISMISSAL ON EQUITABLE GROUNDS AND TRANSFERRING VENUE TO THE COUNTY OF MARIN IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN. SPECIFICALLY, FIRST AND THIRD ELEMENTS OF EQUITABLE RELIEF ARE NOT ADEQUATELY ADDRESS IN THE MOTION. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn For Order Vacating Dismissal On Equitable Grounds And Transferring Venue To The County Of Marin
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roxana Vatanparast, Esq. (415-675-3420) for California Reconveyance Company, defendant and opposing party / No appearances by plaintiff and moving party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF BRANDY TRUEMAN's Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal On Equitable Grounds And Transferring Venue To The County Of Marin is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden. Specifically, first and third elements of equitable relief are not adequately address in the motion. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn For Order Vacating Dismissal On Equitable Grounds And Transferring Venue To The County Of Marin
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Continued To Jun-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF BRANDY TRUEMAN's Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal On Equitable Grounds And Transferring Venue To The County Of Marin is continued to June 21, 2013. Courtesy copies to moving papers received on June 19, 2013 at 11:55 a.m. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY AND JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Off calendar for Department 302. This motion will be heard in Department 501. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steve Egler (415-464-3403) of Bryan Cave for California Reconveyance Company, JP Morgan Chase Bank, defendants and moving parties; No other appearance

Discussion re location of property in Marin County - Court having reviewed the pleadings and discussion with moving party rules as follows: This matter is dismissed for lack of jurisidiction. Defendant to submit proposed order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)

Defendants' California Reconveyance Company And Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Motion To Strike Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-17-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steve Egler (415-464-3403) of Bryan Cave for California Reconveyance Company, JP Morgan Chase Bank, defendants and moving parties; No other appearance

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Defendants' California Reconveyance Company And Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Motion To Strike Complaint is moot. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Not reported (D501)
